TextENGNew: July 11th, Showa 58 (Monday). Inside Kakiuchi Station.
changeReason: Old converts 昭和58年 to '1983' (Western calendar); new preserves 'Showa 58' (Japanese era dating), retaining the original cultural context.

TextENGNew: "...Here, Akasaka-san."
"Ah... Thanks."
Madoka-san handed me a paper cup full of tea... and I let out a sigh because I couldn't remember how many I had today.
She must have noticed my reaction. She sat down on the sofa across from me and said "Akasaka-san" in a stern voice.
"I understand you're feeling hurt, but if thinking about it isn't going to do you any good, there's no sense dwelling on it.@k@vS08/29/321200319. So, pull yourself together."
"Yeah, I know.@k@vS08/13/321000947. ...Even I understand that."
Even if I beat myself up over it, time wouldn't turn backwards. ...I understood that, but I just couldn't help thinking about it.
If circumstances were different at that time, on that day...
How many more lives could have been saved?
We could have protected their happiness...

"...We were able to help Akira Toudou-kun, who only suffered minor injuries.@k@vS08/29/321200321. And we secured the perpetrator before she could cause serious harm to herself.@k@vS08/29/321200322. Akasaka-san, those two are alive thanks to you and the rest of the team.@k@vS08/29/321200323. ...That's an undeniable fact."
"Even so, if we had arrived...@k@vS08/13/321000949. an hour, no, even 30 minutes earlier.@k@vS08/13/321000950. If we had made it there, her parents would be..."

"Akasaka-san.@k@vS08/29/321200325. If you keep saying these conceited things... I'll get angry with you, just like I did with Sis, ok?@k@vS08/29/321200326. And I'll have to say things like, "You're not a god, you know?""
"Madoka-san..."
With a giggle and a gentle smile, Madoka-san had a distant look in her eyes like she was reminiscing about the old days.
"Sis... also said that after every murder case.@k@vS08/29/321200328. How she wished she'd solved the case earlier... stuff like that."
"Really, it's not like those TV dramas where the mystery is solved in a flash and the suspect confesses or vows to become a good person for no good reason."
"If she'd been more selfish... if she could have just set aside her feelings, I think she would've had less to worry about, and a good chance of obtaining happiness."

"Even if you live so earnestly, working so hard over a foolish notion of integrity, there are others out there who act shrewder and smarter, and thus rise up in the world.@k@vS08/29/321200332. She was just hurting herself doing all of that... at least, that's what I used to think."
"No, even now, I still think that just a little."
"But", Madoka-san said while raising her head... and gallantly looking off in the distance.
"So many people cried when Sis died.@k@vS08/29/321200335. Even people who made fun of her or badmouthed her. Everyone."
"Even the chief of the Second Investigation Division, who always said things like, "You're awfully hoity-toity for a lady," and was blatantly hostile with her..."
...I knew the Second Division chief, too.
Unlike Chief Yamamura of the First Division, he was a divisive person who constantly complained to Chief Yamaoki that our activities were disturbing their on-site investigations.
Naturally, he must have complained about Chief Inspector Minai, who acknowledged all that.
Still, when she died, he said something that stabbed me right in the heart...
"That rambunctious girl.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_okabe1002. ...Who am I going to trade barbs with now?"
"Close friends, and even people who didn't get along with her were sad to hear of her passing.@k@vS08/29/321200338. ...That's pretty amazing, don't you think?"
"It's proof that she was important... that everyone relied on her, and loved her..."
"Yes, that's true.@k@vS08/13/321000955. Without a doubt..."
...People can't live forever. They spend their entire lives trying to fulfill their thoughts and dreams, so it's especially heartbreaking when a person dies before they can achieve those dreams.
Nevertheless... there's something wonderful about knowing how many people can recognize their contributions, and that those memories will live on in so many people.

Happiness and individual wealth disappear after death. However, a person's efforts and accomplishments to improve society, even on a small scale, are protected by the people who remember what they accomplished.
Maybe I'm exaggerating and overthinking this. But still, as long as I remember her, I'll never even consider leaving the police force.
"You know... I was never a respectable person.@k@vS08/29/321200341. I made a lot of wrong turns, stepped on a lot of toes, and made trouble for a lot of people."
"...But thanks to Sis, I was able to get back on the right path.@k@vS08/29/321200343. And for Sis, I think her goal was always to be more like Dad."
"So... from now on, I'll have to be stronger.@k@vS08/29/321200345. When a lot of people are feeling depressed or frustrated, they can look to me for help and I'll encourage them to do their best."
"...And in order to do that, I need to be happy, myself.@k@vS08/29/321200347. That was the one thing Sis wanted most..."
Madoka-san said that with determination as she wiped the tears from her face with a handkerchief.
(...Right. It's the same for me too...)
"...Thank you, Madoka-san."
"Huh?"

"This is no time to be feeling depressed.@k@vS08/13/321000960. Rather than regret the things I couldn't do, I should make an effort to do all I can from now on.@k@vS08/13/321000961. ...I'll do my best too, for everyone else's sake."
Staying here and looking backwards won't accomplish anything. I only need to look forward.
Because the future lies ahead...
"Oh, right.@k@vS08/29/321200350. I... haven't actually told Kaoru-san yet,@k@vS08/29/321200351. but I think it happened."
"It happened? ...Oh."
Madoka-san looked embarrassed as she gently stroked her stomach... and when I realized what that indicated, I instantly began to smile.
"Congratulations.@k@vS08/13/321000964. I'm sure Chief Yamaoki will be delighted."
"Ahahaha, I wonder.@k@vS08/29/321200353. He'll probably be embarrassed and treat it more like a grandchild."
I couldn't imagine that.
A person with passion in their heart like him would never be unhappy to have a child just because they've grown old.
Well, it'll probably become a funny story in the police station once it gets out... but that's also nice.
No matter what, it'll be better than the dark topics currently dragging us down...
"Then, I guess the wedding's not too far off, is it?@k@vS08/13/321000966. And you'll have to think about a name, huh?"
"Ahahaha, don't be too hasty."
"...But if it's a girl, I've already decided, there's only one name it could be."
...I didn't even need to ask what the name was. I'm sure she'll be delighted with it.
I could imagine Chief Inspector Minai's face looking bright red as she tried to hide her embarrassment and act like she wasn't interested, and it made me smile for a moment.
"Oh, Akasaka-san, you're here too?@k@vS08/11/321100904. And Madoka-chan as well?"
"Oh, Ooishi-san."
Ooishi-san came into the break room to buy some cigarettes.
Madoka-san returned his greeting with a smile, then whispered to me "...It's still a secret to everyone." And then, she adjusted the hem of her skirt as she stood up.
"Alright Akasaka-san, see you later.@k@vS08/29/321200357. You too, Kura-chan♪."
"Yeah, have a good year."
A faint smell of perfume wafted over as Madoka-san left the break room. After watching her leave, Ooishi pulled a cigarette from his breast pocket and lit it.
"Anyway, I'm relieved that she's doing better."
"I was worried about you too, but she had it the hardest...@k@vS08/11/321100908. I wanted to be sure she wouldn't follow after her sister."
"Madoka-san is a strong woman.@k@vS08/13/321000969. She's Chief Inspector Minai's little sister, after all."
"Of course."
Ooishi-san strongly nodded in agreement. ...As he said that, the look in his face indicated that he had something to discuss.
"...So Ooishi-san, how is the girl feeling?"

"She has minor self-inflicted injuries, but nothing that would slow down the investigation.@k@vS08/11/321100911. Though, she was asleep when I visited earlier, thanks to all the medication she's taking."
The "girl" he was talking about was Natsumi Kimiyoshi-san.
After securing her from the crime scene at the Kimiyoshi house, she was taken to the police hospital under strict guard.
Unfortunately, Kanou-san ordered me to prepare a report for the Director as soon as possible, so I asked Ooishi-san and Detective Fujita to handle the questioning of Natsumi-san.
"Come to think of it, isn't that the same hospital Aoi Hatakeyama was admitted to?"
"Yes, although she's in a separate room.@k@vS08/11/321100913. ...Anyway, Detective Fujita tells me that Natsumi Kimiyoshi has been clear and cooperative in answering our questions."
"However... it seems that she doesn't understand anything she did."
"Huh?@k@vS08/13/321000973. ...You mean she doesn't remember the murders?"

"Well, according to her... she awoke in this hospital, only to find that her memories of the past few days were fragmented.@k@vS08/11/321100916. We've tried several different interrogation approaches, but her answer is always the same."
"Not only that, but her story is consistent.@k@vS08/11/321100918. ...It doesn't seem like she's intentionally lying about it."
"What does that mean...?"
I was completely stunned by how much that information seemed to contradict the facts.

"Based on the state of the crime scene, there should be no doubt that Natsumi Kimiyoshi is the culprit.@k@vS08/13/321000976. The forensics team came to the same conclusion, didn't they?@k@vS08/13/321000977. They said her bloody fingerprints were left clearly on the murder weapon."

"About that, Akasaka-san.@k@vS08/11/321100920. ...I'm thinking we may have made a misunderstanding of sorts.@k@vS08/11/321100921. Natsumi Kimiyoshi definitely murdered her parents and her grandmother in an emotional outburst."
"Misunderstanding...?@k@vS08/13/321000979. What do you mean?"
Ooishi-san seemed like he still didn't understand, himself. He crushed his cigarette in the ashtray and lit a second one. Then, he closed his eyes and carefully chose his words before speaking to me.

"Well...@k@vS08/11/321100924. just as you deduced, Akasaka-san, she certainly held intense emotions toward her parents.@k@vS08/11/321100925. And her medication was suppressing those emotions, so when it ran out, bang, she blew up."
"I don't think that's wrong, but...@k@vS08/11/321100927. I'm also thinking her emotions weren't the only thing being split off."
"Other than emotions... like what?"
"Specifically, her memories...@k@vS08/11/321100929. You might even go as far as to say that her personality was split in two."
"Her memories and her personality... were split in two?!"
Even I had a hard time accepting Ooishi-san's theory.

...That was only natural. Because if what he said was correct, then that meant Natsumi Kimiyoshi suffered from "dual personality" disorder, essentially having two independent personalities coexisting in a single body.

"That's ridiculous...@k@vS08/13/321000983. Aren't split personalities the sort of thing you read about in stories?@k@vS08/13/321000984. In reality, there's no such thing as two personalities in a single person..."
"Actually, Chief Yamaoki introduced me to a psychiatrist who indicated that it all seemed entirely possible."

"It's a type of mental illness, where the person in question has a strong enough sense of self-loathing toward their negative emotions that the brain can rationalize that part of itself as a separate entity to segregate itself from it.@k@vS08/11/321100932. There are actually several reported cases of this."
In a sense, you could call it a form of "escapism."
Much like how every human being has an innate desire to be great... to be the hero or heroine of their own story, they also wish to be their ideal self.
However, in most cases, people get disappointed by the gap between reality and their ideals, compromise, and learn what ideas and actions are socially acceptable or not.
...However, if that gap is too severe the person can refuse to accept reality, isolating themself from society by immersing in their ideals. That's "escapism."
And that's possible even within an "individual", the smallest society there is.
In other words... in order to live up to their ideals and rid themself of their jealousy, hatred, malice, etc..... they can decide that those dark emotions belong to a separate entity.

As a result, all those negative thoughts and memories are thrust upon this "other person" that they subconsciously constructed, and they can enjoy the satisfaction that what remains meets their ideals...
"Well, it's all fine and good up until that point.@k@vS08/11/321100934. The problem is, this "other person" that all the problems are pushed onto develops its own sense of self."
"So if the dark persona decides that the light persona is the "impostor," it'll start to think that those dark emotions are its true "ideals.""
"If that keeps going on long enough, the memories and personalities might become completely separate from one another."
"So, this is where that medicine comes in.@k@vS08/11/321100938. The story we've been told is that Natsumi Kimiyoshi has been taking that medicine to suppress her intense emotions."
"However, if she has two completely independent personalities with their own sets of memories, that changes things."
"...This medicine is so strong that it apparently was prohibited in the West."
"So, maybe this medicine didn't actually eliminate the impulses of her dark side, but instead pushed those piling impulses away from her light side and onto her dark side..."
"If it served as a sort of lid to keep those emotions from ever being seen... what would happen?"
"...The emotions accumulating on the dark side would grow, bigger and bigger!@k@vS08/13/321000987. And, if some event caused the personalities to switch, they would explode right away...!!"
"Just like a dam bursting under a heavy rain storm.@k@vS08/11/321100944. And once the dam breaks, it'll sweep everything away in a flash flood."
"And not only that, but since the dark side is the one that exploded, the light side doesn't remember anything about what happened when they were switched."
"Quite the opposite, they wouldn't even know they had murderous intent within them.@k@vS08/11/321100947. ...Thinking about that way, everything up until now adds up."
"Then, that medicine isn't a cure, but actually...!"
"It makes people transform into demons... It's a diabolical medicine."
After hearing those words from Ooishi-san... I felt completely aghast, and lost my voice.
Then... could this medicine have a larger role in the tragedies we've seen thus far?!
And if so, who created this medicine? Where did it come from?!
Unraveling one mystery only led to another mystery, taunting and laughing at us...
"...That's all.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_PoliFa1010. Thank you for your cooperation."
"Ah, of course..."
"If you need anything else, don't hesitate to ask.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_PoliFa1012. Hospital meals will be served two hours from now."
"Oh, umm..."
Natsumi looked up at the female detective standing next to her with a shy and embarrassed look on her face. Then,
"W-would it be ok... if I went to the bathroom?"
"Huh?@k@vS08/00/VT2B_PoliFa1014. Aah, no problem. I can show you the way."
Natsumi deeply bowed her head while saying "Thank you very much," then hopped off the bed and put on her slippers.
...As they watched that, Detective Fujita and Detective Hanada couldn't help but feel uncomfortable.
"Hey... Hanada."
"What is it?"
"Did this girl... really kill her parents and grandmother?"
Of course, both of them knew it was an undeniable fact.
...Still, it was hard to believe that a pretty, youthful girl with those big, soft eyes could dirty her hands with murder.

"If she gave off a more violent impression, if just looking at her made my blood run cold, I could leave this place without a second thought.@k@vS08/31/320900118. ...But it's maddening to see this girl like a cute little animal instead."
"...You can't judge people by their appearance.@k@vS08/32/VT2B_hanada1056. Really, just think of your wife?"
"I could say the same about you, jackass."
"...Yeah.@k@|@y@vS08/32/VT2B_hanada1058. You can't truly understand any human being other than yourself, I suppose."
"Come on, I was joking around.@k@|@y@vS08/31/VT2B_fujita1002. ...Did you just have a fight with your wife, or something?"
Fujita joked as he glanced at his wristwatch... They had another two hours before they could switch with Ooishi and Akasaka.
For now, the two of them had time to kill, so they decided to chat about upcoming investigation activities and various other topics.
I entered the private room and locked the door behind me. ...Even though she was also woman, not even that police officer followed me inside.
"Haah..."
...I didn't have any particular reason for coming here. I just wanted to spend some time alone.
My mind was still foggy.
I couldn't really remember what happened to my body at all.
What am I even doing inside this hospital in the first place?
"I... hate hospitals."
...I thought back to three years ago.
I was hospitalized for anemia back then... and I spent two months there, undergoing all sorts of tests before they let me go.
Come to think of it, what kind of testing was it? I can't remember much of anything about my hospitalization.
At any rate, I wonder why my family isn't coming?
Dad probably can't make it because he's busy with work, but... Mom and Grandma should be able to come...
There's no use thinking about it. And if I stay in here too long, the detectives will start to worry.
Actually... why are there detectives in my hospital room in the first place?
"Haah... Huh?!"
As soon as I opened the door of the private room... I immediately froze when I discovered a humanoid shadow standing in front of me.
Looking more closely, it was a girl wearing cute pajamas.
She innocently smiled as she tilted her head and looked up at me.
"Who... are you?"
"...You're just like me, huh?"
"I'm... what?!"
"Isn't that so?@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1012. ...Sis, you killed your Mama and Papa, didn't you?"
Suddenly.
This innocuous girl managed to say such a terrible thing without a second thought... For a moment, I doubted my ears.
What... is this girl?
This killing she just mentioned... who?!
"You don't need to hide it. Sis... you're a murderer, right?"
"Wh-what are you saying...?"

"You and I are the same, aren't we?@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1015. Mama and Papa... I've hated them for a long time.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1016. They were always so annoying, ordering me around all the time.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1017. And since Grandpa came home, they've always been fighting."
"Thanks to that, my friends bullied me. They said I was a ghost living in a haunted house.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1019. Even so, I tried to put up with it, but Kentarou just wouldn't stop crying."
"...Families just hold you back, don't they? No matter how much you hate them, they'll be with you for the rest of your life.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1021. That is... unless someone killed them... Right?"
"So you killed them, didn't you?@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1023. Sis.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1024. Why else would you be in this hospital?"
"With all these detectives watching over you...@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1026. With you being subjecting to various inspections and exams.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1027. Don't you see?"
"Y-you're wrong, I... I...?!"

"Ahahahaha.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1029. There's nothing to be afraid of.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1030. Because it's been repeating in your head so many times, hasn't it?@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1031. A dream where you kill them, smiling and laughing while covered in bright red blood..."
"...I got a message from your teacher earlier.@k@vS08/00/320600029. You... had a part-time job and you kept it secret from us...?"
When I heard that... I froze.
I knew it... That teacher broke her promise after all...! She told me, "I won't tell your parents," and I believed her!!
"...What do you have to say, Natsumi?"

"I won't understand unless you say something, right?@k@vS08/00/320600032. I don't know what your reason is, but why on earth did you think it was a good idea to take on a part-time job without your parents' permission?"
"I give you a proper allowance, don't I?@k@vS08/00/320600034. If you told me why you needed the money, I might've been willing to help."
"But when you sneak around and keep secrets, it looks like you're up to no good."
"I bet Saeki-san and Makimura-san were responsible for this. Did they feed you strange ideas about how to use money?!"
"You can't squander money.@k@vS08/00/320600038. Dad and Grandma might be kind enough to look past this, but do you expect me to be so forgiving?"

"Hey, Natsumi.@k@vS08/00/320600040. You understand that I'm thinking of you and looking out for you, right?@k@vS08/00/320600041. Because, you too are a daughter of the Kimiyoshi family...@k@vS08/00/320600042. Hey, are you even listening? Natsumi?!"
The very next moment...
My racing emotions and shattering heart suddenly became colorless, transparent... The thoughts in my head cleared up.
I wasn't angry. I wasn't afraid. Sorrow, suffering, guilt, gratitude, despair... I felt none of them.
Everything intricately mixed together... the vectors in my mind coalesced on one thing.
...Who?
Who asked me to be a part of this family?
When did you ask me to become a member of the Kimiyoshi family?
Do you seriously believe I would have wanted to be born a Hinamizawan?!
...Tap.
I've suffered excruciating hardship since I came to this city, thanks to being born and raised in the countryside.
...Tap, tap.
And thanks to that great disaster, I've had to keep secrets I didn't need to bear and make great efforts to maintain them to hide my connection to those freaks.
...Tap, tap, tap...
There's nothing for it. ...I was trying so hard, but Hinamizawa ruined everything...!
The Three Families? Oyashiro-sama? The curse? Like I care about any of that!
Hinamizawa hasn't given me anything. ...It gave me that horrible disaster, that's it!!
If only I wasn't from Hinamizawa! I'd be treating everyone normally, without having to bear all these inferiority complexes and obligations!!
I'd be playing with my friends like normal! Struggling to improve my grades like normal!! And finding a person to fall in love with, like normal!!!
It's all Hinamizawa's fault!! My happiness, efforts, and dreams have all gone up in smoke because I grew up in that wretched place!!
".......If that's the case...!!@k@vS08/36/320100523. If that's the case... I don't need this anymore!!!@k@vS08/36/320100524. It should all go away!! Disappeeeeeeeeear!!"
"...Natsumi?@k@vS08/00/320600044. Where do you think you're going? I was still talking to...@k@vS08/00/320600045. Eek?!"
"S-stop it, Natsumi!@k@vS08/00/320600047. What are you thinking?!@k@vS08/00/320600048. S-s-st-stooooop!!"
"Haruko?@k@vS08/00/320800019. What's wrong?@k@vS08/00/320800020. I heard a weird scream...@k@vS08/00/320800021. E-eeeeek?!"
"I'm home.@k@vS08/00/320700034. ...Huh? What's this smell?@k@vS08/00/320700035. Heeey, Haru..."
"Haah... haah... haah...!!"
My heart was beating against the inside of my chest hard enough to shatter it.
Wh-what did I see just now...?!
Was that a dream...?
Or... was that the wish I was always hoping for?
"So?@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1033. If you're going to run away... now's your chance."

"Teehehe...@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1035. Because, Sis, you have the look of someone who isn't done killing.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1036. Isn't there still someone,@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1037. that you want to kill...?"
...Oh. Come to think of it.
I remembered. Yeah... I just remembered.
Ahahahaha, how could I forget? I'm such an idiot.
That stupid detective interrupted my precious plan before I was finished.
Well then... what am I going to do about him? Kill him?
No... that's no good. Absolutely not.
I won't kill... Toudou-kun. Because I don't want to give him another reason to hate me...!
In that case... who? Who should I take with me?
Ehehe, ehehehehe...!
That's obvious... It's her, of course!!
She wasn't that badly injured, so she's still out there!
The one taking my happiness from me...!!
Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!@k That's right!!@k She's still out there!@k Gugyagogegigegyogugegegegegegegegegegegegegegegegege!!!
"Kimiyoshi-san?@k@vS08/00/VT2B_PoliFa1016. What's going on, Kimiyoshi-san?"
"...?! D-damn it!!@k@vS08/00/VT2B_PoliFa1018. Hurry, contact the station right away!!"
"Hehe, ehehehehehehehehehe.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1039. ...Everyone must die.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_aoi1040. Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha."
